title: phymatopsis hastata var. pygmaea
intro: Phymatopsis hastata var. pygmaea, also known as pygmaea fir club moss, is a type of small, shrub-like plant that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. The medicinal properties of Phymatopsis hastata var. pygmaea include its ability to stimulate circulation and act as a diuretic, helping to reduce fluid retention. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. Phymatopsis hastata var. pygmaea is often prepared as a tea or tincture, allowing its medicinal properties to be utilized for various health purposes.
